modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to view multiple pages of PDF files in Adobe Reader.

full_description_text:  
User is having trouble viewing PDF files.  
Only the first page is visible in Adobe Reader DC.  
When trying to open in Internet Explorer, the browser crashes.  
Also, printing a Docusign document from the window is not working.
short_description: Unable to view multiple pages of PDF files in Adobe Reader.
description:
User is having trouble viewing PDF files.  
Only the first page is visible in Adobe Reader DC.  
When trying to open in Internet Explorer, the browser crashes.  
Also, printing a Docusign document from the window is not working.
